name: Bayou Magic Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 3/4 oz.) Healthy Request cream of mushroom soup
1 (10 3/4 oz.) Healthy Request cream of celery soup
1 (14 oz.) Bayou Magic Cajun Rice mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken tenders, onion, celery, and pepper in a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. When they start to brown, add 1 cup water.
3. Simmer for 20 minutes, or until tender and thick. Cut the chicken tenders into bite-size pieces.
4. Add the mushroom and celery soups, 2 soup cans of water, and the chicken broth.
5. While this is heating a little, put the rice into a colander or strainer and shake some of the pepper out (if seasoned too hot for your taste). Add the rice to the mixture.
6. Place in a casserole dish about 11x13 inches, cover with foil, and bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until the rice is tender.
